headline: Invesco Rising Dividends Fund Q4 2025 Portfolio Activity
summary: Linde was purchased due to its essential and resilient business model, anchored by long-term contracts and leadership in industrial gases.

headline: Parker-Hannifin: Another Strong Quarter, But Limited Upside At Current Price (Downgrade)
summary: Parker-Hannifin (PH) delivered a strong Q2, beating revenue and EPS expectations, but shares now trade at a significant premium.
